---
title: "Labs"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.landing-hero}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Applied labs</span>

# Practice the design choices, not just the estimator

This section collects worksheet-style pages for hands-on design work. Use it when you want to move from abstract method guidance into benchmark examples, tradeoff decisions, and concrete diagnostics.

<div class="page-metadata">
  <span>Hands-on exercises</span>
  <span>Benchmark examples</span>
  <span>Design-first workflow</span>
</div>
:::

## Matching Labs {#matching-labs .section-heading}

<p class="section-intro">These are the strongest practical pages on the site.</p>

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-guide">Core report</span>

### [Matching Methods Report](matching-methods-report.qmd)

Long-form reference report on exact matching, `CEM`, and entropy balancing before you move into the shorter worksheet labs.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-lab">Core lab</span>

### [LaLonde Matching Lab](lalonde-matching-lab.qmd)

Best first practical exercise for understanding matching design, overlap, and benchmark logic.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-applied">Applied case</span>

### [Black Politicians Lab](black-politicians-lab.qmd)

Use this when you want a more context-specific exercise.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-lab">Benchmark</span>

### [NSW and CPS Benchmark Lab](nsw-cps-benchmark-lab.qmd)

Best for stress-testing matching choices against a canonical benchmark comparison.
:::
:::

::: {.path-grid}
::: {.path-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-applied">Applied case</span>

### [HISP IE Practice Lab](hisp-ie-practice-lab.qmd)

Use this when you want a more open-ended practice page.
:::

::: {.path-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-skeleton">Build-out route</span>

### Synthetic control design labs

- [Synthetic Control Design Lab](synthetic-control-design-lab.qmd)
- [Synthetic Control Donor Pool Lab](synthetic-control-donor-pool-lab.qmd)

Treat these as structured lab skeletons.
:::
:::

<div class="principle-banner">
  <h2>Working rule</h2>
  <p>Define the design before estimating, document the tradeoffs introduced by the design, and state clearly what the resulting comparison can and cannot support.</p>
</div>

</div>
